---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new CREBAIN capability or workflow improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Briefly describe the requested feature.

## Motivation

What user, operator, developer, or release-readiness problem does this solve?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe how the feature should work from the user’s perspective.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Behavior is testable or manually smoke-testable
- [ ] Documentation impact is identified
- [ ] Security and external-input boundaries are clear
- [ ] Performance, ML, ROS, or transport claims are measured or explicitly labeled as assumptions

## Evidence and Constraints

If the feature depends on performance, ML accuracy, ROS/Gazebo compatibility, transport behavior, model contracts, or security assumptions, include measurements, authoritative references, or explicit assumptions.

## Alternatives Considered

List other designs or workflows you considered.

## Additional Context

Add diagrams, screenshots, mockups, related issues, or examples.
